query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_academy_practice_attempts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  topicId INT NOT NULL,
  courseId INT NOT NULL,
  attemptNumber INT NOT NULL,
  score INT NOT NULL,
  totalQuestions INT NOT NULL,
  percentage INT NOT NULL,
  difficulty ENUM('easy', 'medium', 'hard') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bridge_academy_practice_attempts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  topicId INT NOT NULL,
  courseId INT NOT NULL,
  attemptNumber INT NOT NULL,
  score INT NOT NULL,
  totalQuestions INT NOT NULL,
  percentage INT NOT NULL,
  difficulty ENUM('easy', 'medium', 'hard') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
